Booky design system

Foundations

The living reference for every token and component in the template. Each build phase adds its section here — this page is how a phase is reviewed.

Phases 1–6 — tokens · primitives · nav & overlays · cards · store · sections

Phase 1 · Tokens

Color

A near-monochrome cream-and-ink world. Bronze is the only accent and appears sparingly — book covers provide all other color on real pages.

Surfaces & ink

paper

page background

paper-deep

section band

surface

cards · inputs

ink

headings · buttons

ink-soft

body text

ink-faint

meta · hints

Accent & semantic

accent

antique bronze

gold

rating stars

sale

offers · madder red

success

confirmation

warning

notice

danger

errors

Lines & rules

line — hairline borders

line-strong — inputs, active edges

Phase 1 · Tokens

Typography

Prata — a high-contrast display serif — carries every heading at a single natural weight. Jost — a light geometric sans — handles body, UI and the letterspaced small-caps overlines. Hierarchy comes from size and case, never boldness.

.display — hero scale (fluid clamp)

Find your next great read

h1 · 3rem

The Quiet Art of the Bookshop

h2 · 2.25rem

Stories Bound in Cloth and Paper

h3 · 1.75rem

A Chapter for Every Evening

h4 · 1.375rem

Margins, Notes and Memory

overline — the section signature

Some quality reading    Muted variant

body · 1rem / 1.7

A good bookshop is a quiet argument for slowness. You arrive looking for one title and leave with three you did not know existed — each one recommended by a hand-written card tucked beneath its cover.

lead · 1.125rem / light

Thousands of hand-picked titles across every genre, chosen by readers who love books as much as you do.

small & meta · 0.875rem

Hardcover · 384 pages · Published 2026 · Independent Press

Phase 1 · Tokens

Spacing & rhythm

A 4px scale with named extensions. Sections breathe with --section-y — fluid from 4.5rem on phones to 8rem on desktop.

4 · 0.25rem
8 · 0.5rem
16 · 1rem
24 · 1.5rem
32 · 2rem
48 · 3rem
72 · 4.5rem
88 · 5.5rem
120 · 7.5rem

Containers: main 1240px · narrow 1000px · prose 720px.

Phase 1 · Tokens

Radius & elevation

A near-square language — 2/4/8px only, no pills. Shadows belong to book covers, not cards: cards stay flat with hairlines, covers float.

radius-xs · 2px

covers, images

radius-sm · 4px

buttons, inputs

radius-md · 8px

cards (rare)

shadow-cover

resting cover

shadow-cover-lg

hero cover

shadow-drop

dropdowns

shadow-modal

dialogs

Phase 1 · Tokens

The dark set

Used only by the two dark-first demos (Night Reads, Nova) — baked onto the page at build time, never toggled. A night library: deep, near-neutral charcoal lit by a soft brass-gold accent and cream type; lighter edges replace shadows.

paper

deep charcoal

paper-deep

band

surface

cards

accent

brass gold

gold

stars

BUTTON

btn

light bar on dark

Night reads

Stories for the small hours

A dark-page preview: same tokens, designed for darkness — not an inverted light page.

Phase 1 · Tokens

Motion

Slow, soft, never bouncy. Two easings and four durations cover the whole template; GSAP choreography arrives in Phase 16 and always respects prefers-reduced-motion.

ease-out — cubic-bezier(.22, 1, .36, 1) · entrances, reveals

ease-smooth — cubic-bezier(.45, 0, .55, 1) · color & hover

fast 150ms — hovers, focus

base 300ms — drawers, fades

slow 600ms — scroll reveals

slower 900ms — hero entrance

Phase 2 · UI kit

Buttons

Understated charcoal bars with letterspaced labels, a hairline outline, a quiet ghost, and the "read more →" text link from the reference. Hover lifts a hair; the link's arrow nudges.

Sizes

States

Phase 2 · UI kit

Form fields

Boxed inputs for cards and panels, a bottom-rule variant for bands, and full label / hint / error / success wiring with role="alert" messages.

As it appears on your card.

Enter a valid email address.

Code applied — 10% off.

Newsletter
Phase 2 · UI kit

Selection controls

Checkbox

Radio

Switch

Quantity

Radio cards — format / shipping pickers

Badges, chips & price

Badges

Phase 3 · UI kit

Navigation & overlays

The header above is live — hover or keyboard-focus Shop for the mega-menu and Pages for the dropdown, open the search overlay (top-right), or shrink the window for the off-canvas drawer. Below: tabs, accordion, a modal and toasts.

Phase 3 · UI kit

Tabs

A luminous, character-driven novel about memory and the sea — the kind of book you finish slowly so it never ends. Arrow keys move between tabs.

Hardcover · 384 pages · 198 × 129 mm · Published 2026 · Independent Press · ISBN 978-1-0000-0000-0.

Free UK delivery over $35, dispatched within one working day. 30-day returns on every order.

Phase 3 · UI kit

Accordion

Yes — we ship worldwide with tracked delivery. Rates are calculated at checkout based on weight and destination.
Return any book within 30 days for a full refund, provided it's in resaleable condition.
Of course. Add gift wrap at checkout and include a handwritten note for the recipient.
Phase 3 · UI kit

Footer B — slim

A compact footer for utility pages (login, 404, checkout). Footer A — the full columned footer — closes this page below.

© 2026 Booky. A premium bookstore template.

About FAQ Contact Terms Privacy
Phase 4 · Cards

Product cards — four styles

One catalogue, four voices. The cover & title link to the product; every card carries four actions — quick view · add to cart · compare · like. Hover or keyboard-focus a card to reveal them.

Card 1 — Reveal · add slides up, rest on the side

The Lantern of Aldridge BayEleanor Finch
$16.00
Sale
Letters to the SeaCora Beaumont
$14.00$19.00
New

$13.50

$21.00

Card 4 — Row · list view, all four in the rail

Literary fictionWhere the Rivers RememberA. Sorensen

A luminous, century-spanning novel about the families who settle a coast and the tides that slowly rewrite their fortunes.

(214)
$17.25
MysteryThe Clockmaker's DaughterIsla Brennan

A locked-room puzzle that unwinds across four generations of a watchmaking family in the old quarter.

(98)
$13.00

"The loveliest bookshop I've found online — the covers alone make me want to read everything. Ordering feels like a small, civilised pleasure."
Harriet L. · member since 2021
"Beautifully packaged and dispatched the same day. The handwritten note was a lovely touch."

Phase 6 · Sections

Heroes & commerce sections

Hero archetypes H1–H3 and the commerce section set (S1–S6, S27, S28), each a standalone partial that real demo pages compose from Phase 8. Sliders run on Swiper (drag · arrows · dots); the deal timer is countdown.js. Every product card keeps its four actions.

New this season

The Lantern of Aldridge Bay

A keeper's quiet record of one storm-bound winter — and the light that refused to go out. Eleanor Finch's most luminous novel yet.

Read more
Editor's pick

Salt & Starlight

Two islands, one tide, and a correspondence that spans forty years. A tender meditation on distance from Marina Vøllo.

Read more
Just arrived

A Cartography of Dreams

Petra Lindgren maps the places we visit only while sleeping — part atlas, part confession, wholly unforgettable.

Read more
A bookshop for slow readers

Twelve thousand hand-picked titles, one quiet recommendation engine, and free shipping on everything over $30.

Stories worth staying up for

Picture books, first chapters and read-alouds — chosen by booksellers who still believe in bedtime.

Bestseller of the month · by Tomás Iriarte

Where the Rivers Remember

A drowned valley gives up its secrets one summer, and a hydrologist returns to the village her family left behind. A sweeping novel about water, memory, and the things we choose to bury.

$18.00 $24.00
Shop it now

Phase 7 · Sections

Content sections & forms

The content section set (S7–S21, S29): newsletter, articles, app band, testimonials, stats, author spotlight, brand strip, CTA, FAQ, how-it-works, social grid, events, genre spotlight, cover wall, membership, and the trust strip. The newsletter and the demo contact form below validate with accessible inline errors via forms.js.

Reading, delivered

Subscribe to our newsletter

One thoughtful email a week — new arrivals, staff picks, and the occasional essay. No noise.

No spam. Unsubscribe in one click, any time.

Take the shelf with you

Your library, in your pocket

Sync your wishlist, track what you're reading, and pick up exactly where you left off. The Booky app keeps every shelf in step across your devices.

What readers say

"Booky is the only shop that feels like walking into a friend's study. Every parcel arrives wrapped like a gift, and the recommendations are uncannily right."
Mira Castellan · Reader since 2019

Booky by the numbers

12,000 Titles in stock
48,000 Books shipped
320 Authors hosted
19 Years on the high street
EF
Author in the spotlight

Eleanor Finch

Finch writes the sea the way others write people — patiently, and with a long memory. Across nine novels she has become one of our most quietly essential voices, returning again and again to the coast where she grew up.

Read her full story

Stocking the houses readers trust

Harrow & Vale Northwind Press Meridian Books The Quill House Aldous & Crane Saltmarsh Editions
Simple as turning a page

How the book club works

1

Join the club

Pick a plan and tell us the genres you love. Cancel any time — no commitment, no fuss.

2

Get your pick

Each month a hand-chosen title arrives at your door, wrapped and ready, with a reading note.

3

Read & discuss

Join the online discussion or a local meet-up, and swap thoughts with fellow readers.

Genre in focus

Nature & place writing

The landscape essay is having a quiet renaissance. These are the books that walk you out of the house and into the weather — attentive, unhurried, and a little in love with the world.

Explore the genre
Read more, pay less

Good to know

Frequently asked

Yes — we ship worldwide with tracked delivery. Rates are calculated at checkout based on weight and destination.
UK orders arrive in 2–3 working days. International delivery typically takes 5–10 working days depending on your location.
Return any title within 30 days for a full refund, provided it's in resaleable condition. We cover return postage on damaged items.

Still have a question?

Our booksellers are on hand Monday to Saturday, 9am–6pm. We usually reply within a few hours.

Contact us
@bookystore

Follow along on Instagram

Everything on the shelves

A wall of stories

Become a member

Join the reading room

Free delivery, members-only editions, and first access to author events. The first month is on us.

Start your membership

Free shipping

On every order over $35, worldwide.

Secure checkout

Encrypted payments you can trust.

Easy returns

30 days, no questions asked.

Reader support

Real booksellers, six days a week.

Phase 7 · Forms

Validated contact form

Submit empty or with a bad email to see accessible inline errors (role="alert", aria-invalid); a valid submit clears the form and fires a success toast.

Booky

An independent bookshop for slow readers — hand-picked titles across every genre, wrapped and sent with care.
